positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration of a cosmic nebula forming a stylized mountain range and a single crescent moon, viewed from above. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant teal, ethereal silver, and soft lavender. Use strong, clean silhouettes with crisp edges, reminiscent of mid-century modern space travel art. The composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for large apparel prints. The overall mood is serene and awe-inspiring, suggesting endless possibility. Include subtle geometric patterns integrated into the cloud structures for depth. Graphic vector art style, high contrast, clean lines, perfect for screen printing.
